text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here—the Arima Kinen. I swear, it's like
a carnival here.
choice_data_list:
It sounds like your phone is part of the carnival
too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm sorry. My phone is ringing non-stop. I'm
receiving a ton of messages today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I checked it just now, and there were dozens.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They're all supportive messages from old folks
who have just learned how to text.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Many of them are very short and full of typos,
like "I wilk be ther. Good lick."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
At the end, they all write the name of their
shopping district. Even the folks in Kokura sent
me messages.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Their support is what led me here. I'm really
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Although, I'm still a bit too embarrassed to say
that to their faces.
choice_data_list: You can repay them by winning the race.
You can repay them by winning the race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute! That's a lot more than just saying
thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess a sourpuss like me needs to do that
much, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Say, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If I win this race today, do you think I can become
the main character?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I'll earn the right to say, "I can shine
as bright as Teio"?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That was quick. You're so confident, as usual.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But today, I accept that confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If I want to get good results today, I'll probably
have to do more than just my best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For Nice Nature, the Arima Kinen and its strong
lineup of runners from each generation is a huge
challenge to take on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But still!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I will!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Uhh, this part makes me the most nervous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, it's on. Let this race decide who is the faster
between us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Of course! I won't pull any punches!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, those two...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And neither shall I. I'll win with elegance... and
with grace.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Mejiro McQueen debuted before me. As
expected from the prestigious Mejiro family, she's
an excellent stayer.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I don't have to be all fancy. I'll race hard
and snatch victory with mud-covered hands!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Mejiro Ryan. Like McQueen, she's from the
Mejiro family and my senior. She's both cheerful
and powerful.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Why is this place full of dazzling stars? I guess
that's only natural for Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But wouldn't it be so exciting if the underdog
won?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I did all I could do. All that's left is to
win on this big stage...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And repay all the people rooting for me!
